context.projectOverview: Architect Decision Lens Panel — opt-in multi-lens panel for the architect's CP2/CP5, on both surfaces. Sprint 1 is the reusable foundation (zero behavior change): a pure synthesize() ranking reducer alongside the existing reconcile(), an arch-lens prompt catalog (src/orchestrator/arch-lenses.ts), and the opt-in architect.panel config. Mirrors the just-shipped evaluator panel (eval-lenses.ts, reconcile, evaluator.panel).

gitNote: Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes exist in the working tree (graph CLI, agent .md, .bober artifacts). Stage ONLY this sprint's files with explicit paths: git add src/orchestrator/workflow/synthesizer.ts src/orchestrator/workflow/synthesizer.test.ts src/orchestrator/arch-lenses.ts src/orchestrator/arch-lenses.test.ts src/config/schema.ts src/config/schema.test.ts (plus any defaults.ts/init.ts/loader.ts/mcp literal you must touch to keep tsc green). NEVER `git add -A`/`git add .`. Branch bober/architect-lens-panel — never main.
